description: Task counts grouped by status for each project.
purpose: Provides task breakdown per project for progress tracking dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT tpm_ts_project_id AS project_id, tpm_ts_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mt_tpm_task WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY tpm_ts_project_id, tpm_ts_status ORDER BY tpm_ts_project_id, CASE tpm_ts_status WHEN 'todo' THEN 1 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 2 WHEN 'in_review' THEN 3 WHEN 'done' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
